# HPD.ML.Abstractions.IAnnotationSet

- Package: `HPD-ML-Abstractions` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Kind: `interface`

Named, typed annotations on a column. Roles (Label, Feature, Weight) use the "role:" prefix. External metadata uses "onnx:", "tf:", etc.
